all.en: My name is Wei-Ting, and I am a senior high school student in Taipei.
all.zh: 我叫偉廷，是台北的一名高中生。

all.en: Next month, I am going to take the GEPT intermediate level test for the first time.
all.zh: 下個月，我將第一次參加全民英檢中級測驗。

all.en: My parents have encouraged me to prepare seriously because the certificate may help me in the future.
all.zh: 爸媽鼓勵我認真準備，因為這張證書未來可能對我有幫助。

all.en: Every day after school, I spend at least one hour reviewing vocabulary and grammar.
all.zh: 每天放學後，我至少花一小時複習單字和文法。

all.en: I also listen to English podcasts on the bus to improve my listening skills.
all.zh: 我也會在公車上聽英文 podcast 來加強聽力。

all.en: My English teacher recommended a useful website that provides free practice tests.
all.zh: 我的英文老師推薦了一個提供免費模擬測驗的實用網站。

all.en: Last weekend, I joined a small study group with three of my classmates.
all.zh: 上週末我加入了一個由三位同學組成的小型讀書會。

all.en: We practiced speaking by asking and answering questions about daily life.
all.zh: 我們透過詢問和回答日常生活的問題來練習口說。

all.en: If I pass the intermediate level, I will try the high-intermediate level next year.
all.zh: 如果我通過中級，明年我就會挑戰中高級。

all.en: I know learning English is not easy, but I really enjoy making progress step by step.
all.zh: 我知道學英文不容易，但我真的很享受一步步進步的過程。

all.en: Sometimes I feel nervous, so my mother reminds me to relax and get enough sleep.
all.zh: 有時候我會感到緊張，所以媽媽會提醒我放輕鬆、要睡飽。

all.en: I believe that with hard work and a positive attitude, I will reach my goal.
all.zh: 我相信只要努力並保持積極的態度，我一定能達成目標。

all.en: Two weeks before the exam, I started taking a full practice test every Saturday morning.
all.zh: 考試前兩週，我開始每週六早上做一次完整的模擬測驗。

all.en: My listening scores improved a lot, but the reading section still made me nervous.
all.zh: 我的聽力分數進步很多，但閱讀部分還是讓我緊張。

all.en: My English teacher kindly offered to check my writing samples after school every Wednesday.
all.zh: 英文老師很好心地願意每週三放學後幫我批改作文。

all.en: She pointed out that my sentences were correct but lacked variety in structure.
all.zh: 她指出我的句子雖然正確，但句型缺乏變化。

all.en: I tried to use new conjunctions and transitions in every essay I wrote.
all.zh: 我試著在每篇文章中使用新的連接詞和轉折詞。

all.en: The night before the exam, my mother made my favorite dumplings to help me relax.
all.zh: 考前一晚，媽媽煮了我最愛的水餃讓我放鬆心情。

all.en: I packed my pencil case, ID card, and admission ticket carefully into my bag.
all.zh: 我把鉛筆盒、身分證和准考證仔細地放進包包裡。

all.en: On the morning of the test, my father drove me to the testing center an hour early.
all.zh: 考試當天早上，爸爸提早一小時開車送我到考場。

all.en: When the exam finally began, I took a deep breath and reminded myself to stay calm.
all.zh: 考試正式開始時，我深吸一口氣，提醒自己保持冷靜。

all.en: Three weeks later, the results arrived, and I had passed the intermediate level with a high score.
all.zh: 三週後成績出爐了，我以高分通過了中級檢定。

all.en: When I told my parents about the result, my mother hugged me so tightly I could barely breathe.
all.zh: 當我把成績告訴爸媽時，媽媽抱我抱得緊到我幾乎喘不過氣。

all.en: My father printed the certificate that very evening and proudly placed it on his office desk.
all.zh: 爸爸當晚就把證書印出來，得意地擺在他辦公桌上。

all.en: My English teacher congratulated me in front of the whole class the following Monday morning.
all.zh: 隔週一早上，英文老師在全班面前恭喜我。

all.en: She also encouraged me to start preparing for the high-intermediate level during the summer vacation.
all.zh: 她也鼓勵我在暑假就開始準備中高級的考試。

all.en: I created a new study schedule and added one hour of writing practice every weekday evening.
all.zh: 我重新訂了讀書計畫，每個平日晚上多加一小時的寫作練習。

all.en: My study group decided to keep meeting, since teamwork had helped us all stay motivated.
all.zh: 讀書會決定繼續一起讀，因為團隊合作讓大家都更有動力。

all.en: One of my classmates suggested watching English news together to improve our listening even more.
all.zh: 有位同學建議大家一起看英文新聞，進一步加強我們的聽力。

all.en: I also signed up to volunteer at a tourist center to practice speaking with real visitors.
all.zh: 我還報名到旅客中心當志工，跟真正的旅客練習口說。

all.en: My first conversation was nervous and short, but the foreign tourist still thanked me kindly.
all.zh: 我的第一次對話既緊張又短促，但那位外國旅客還是親切地向我道謝。

all.en: Looking ahead, I felt certain that English would open many doors for me in the years to come.
all.zh: 展望未來，我深信英文在未來幾年會為我打開許多扇門。

all.en: Over the summer, I created colorful flashcards to memorize the new vocabulary required for the high-intermediate level.
all.zh: 暑假期間，我做了色彩繽紛的單字卡，背誦中高級所需的新單字。

all.en: My study group started meeting twice a week at the public library to share materials and tips.
all.zh: 我的讀書會開始每週在公立圖書館聚兩次，分享資料和讀書心得。

all.en: One classmate taught us how to take notes faster by using simple abbreviations and arrows.
all.zh: 有位同學教我們用簡單的縮寫和箭頭來加快做筆記的速度。

all.en: At the tourist center, I helped a Japanese family find the nearest temple and they thanked me warmly.
all.zh: 在旅客中心，我幫一個日本家庭找到最近的廟宇，他們親切地向我道謝。

all.en: My English teacher gave me a thicker workbook with longer reading passages and harder essay topics.
all.zh: 英文老師給了我一本更厚的練習本，內含更長的閱讀文章和更難的作文題目。

all.en: I struggled with the academic vocabulary at first, but I refused to skip any difficult page.
all.zh: 一開始我對學術單字很吃力，但我堅持不跳過任何一頁難題。

all.en: My father bought me a small whiteboard so I could practice writing essays during quiet evenings.
all.zh: 爸爸買了一塊小白板給我，讓我在安靜的夜晚練習寫作文。

all.en: Mom made sure I drank warm milk every night so I could sleep deeply before the next study session.
all.zh: 媽媽每晚都讓我喝溫牛奶，確保我在下一次讀書前能睡得香甜。

all.en: By the end of the summer, my mock test scores were already approaching the passing line.
all.zh: 暑假結束時，我的模擬測驗分數已經逐漸接近通過標準了。

all.en: I felt grateful for everyone who had supported me, and I knew the real challenge was just beginning.
all.zh: 我對所有支持過我的人心懷感激，也明白真正的挑戰才正要開始。
